name: @borjie/jurisdiction-profile-tz
description: Tanzania jurisdiction profile (UNIV-1, launch beachhead, Mr. Mwikila). Carries the TZ data-protection law mapping (TZ DPA 2022), currency TZS, phone +255, timezone Africa/Dar_es_Salaam, quiet hours 18:00–06:00, language packs [sw, en], vertical [mining-tz], and the four TZ regulators (TRA, Tumemadini, NEMC, BoT) with filing-kind cadences. Implements §7 of Docs/DESIGN/UNIVERSAL_JURISDICTION_SPEC.md.
